mapper.select:
SELECT r.ROOM_ID, r.ROOM_TYPE, r.ROOM_NAME, r.CREATED_AT,
CASE
WHEN r.ROOM_TYPE = 'GROUP' THEN r.ROOM_NAME ELSE (
SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_NAME FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER otherMember JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = otherMember.EMPLOYEE_ID WHERE otherMember.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID
AND otherMember.EMPLOYEE_ID != #{employeeId} LIMIT 1
) END AS DISPLAY_NAME,
CASE WHEN r.ROOM_TYPE = 'GROUP' THEN NULL ELSE ( SELECT e.PROFILE_IMG FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER otherMember JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = otherMember.EMPLOYEE_ID WHERE otherMember.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND otherMember.EMPLOYEE_ID != #{employeeId} LIMIT 1 ) END AS DISPLAY_PROFILE_IMG,
CASE WHEN r.ROOM_TYPE = 'GROUP' THEN NULL ELSE (
SELECT CASE WHEN a.ATTENDANCE_ID IS NOT NULL AND a.CHECK_OUT_TIME IS NULL AND a.ATTENDANCE_STATUS != 'LEAVE' THEN 'WORKING' ELSE 'OFFLINE' END FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER otherMember JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = otherMember.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN ATTENDANCE a ON a.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID AND a.WORK_DATE = CURDATE() WHERE otherMember.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID AND otherMember.EMPLOYEE_ID != #{employeeId} LIMIT 1 ) END AS DISPLAY_WORK_STATUS,
( SELECT CASE WHEN cm.MESSAGE_TYPE = 'FILE' THEN CONCAT( '[파일] ', COALESCE( (SELECT ca.FILE_NAME FROM CHAT_ATTACHMENT ca WHERE ca.MESSAGE_ID = cm.MESSAGE_ID), '파일' ) ) ELSE cm.CONTENT END FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm WHERE cm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID
ORDER BY cm.MESSAGE_ID DESC
LIMIT 1
) AS LAST_MESSAGE,
( SELECT cm.MESSAGE_TYPE FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm WHERE cm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID ORDER BY cm.MESSAGE_ID DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS LAST_MESSAGE_TYPE,
( SELECT cm.SENT_AT FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm WHERE cm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID ORDER BY cm.MESSAGE_ID DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS LAST_SENT_AT,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm WHERE cm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID
AND ( cm.SENDER_ID IS NULL OR cm.SENDER_ID != #{employeeId} )
AND cm.MESSAGE_ID > COALESCE(member.LAST_READ_MESSAGE_ID, 0)
) AS UNREAD_COUNT
FROM CHAT_ROOM r JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER member ON member.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID WHERE member.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId}
ORDER BY COALESCE( ( SELECT MAX(cm.SENT_AT)
FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm WHERE cm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID ), r.CREATED_AT
) DESC
SELECT r.ROOM_ID, r.ROOM_TYPE, r.ROOM_NAME, r.CREATED_AT FROM CHAT_ROOM r JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER member ON member.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID WHERE r.ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND member.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId}

SELECT cm.MESSAGE_ID, cm.ROOM_ID, cm.SENDER_ID, cm.MESSAGE_TYPE, cm.CONTENT, cm.SENT_AT, DATE_FORMAT(cm.SENT_AT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS SENT_DATE_KEY,
CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(cm.SENT_AT, '%Y년 %c월 %e일 '), ELT(DAYOFWEEK(cm.SENT_AT), '일요일', '월요일', '화요일', '수요일', '목요일', '금요일', '토요일') ) AS DISPLAY_SENT_DATE, CONCAT( CASE WHEN HOUR(cm.SENT_AT) < 12 THEN '오전 ' ELSE '오후 ' END,
DATE_FORMAT(cm.SENT_AT, '%h:%i') ) AS DISPLAY_SENT_TIME, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER readMember WHERE readMember.ROOM_ID = cm.ROOM_ID AND readMember.EMPLOYEE_ID != cm.SENDER_ID AND (readMember.LAST_READ_MESSAGE_ID IS NULL OR readMember.LAST_READ_MESSAGE_ID < cm.MESSAGE_ID) ) AS UNREAD_MEMBER_COUNT, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS SENDER_NAME, e.PROFILE_IMG AS SENDER_PROFILE_IMG, ca.ATTACH_ID, ca.MESSAGE_ID AS ATTACH_MESSAGE_ID, ca.FILE_NAME, ca.FILE_PATH, ca.FILE_SIZE FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e
ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = cm.SENDER_ID LEFT JOIN CHAT_ATTACHMENT ca ON ca.MESSAGE_ID = cm.MESSAGE_ID WHERE cm.ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY cm.MESSAGE_ID ASC

SELECT r.ROOM_ID, r.ROOM_TYPE, r.ROOM_NAME, r.CREATED_AT FROM CHAT_ROOM r JOIN CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER member ON member.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID WHERE r.ROOM_TYPE = 'DM' GROUP BY r.ROOM_ID, r.ROOM_TYPE, r.ROOM_NAME, r.CREATED_AT HAVING COUNT(*) = 2
AND SUM(member.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{myEmployeeId}) = 1
AND SUM(member.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{targetEmployeeId}) = 1
LIMIT 1
SELECT EMPLOYEE_ID FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY MEMBER_ROW_ID ASC

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME, e.PROFILE_IMG, e.EMPLOYEE_STATUS, d.DEPT_NAME, p.POSITION_NAME,
CASE WHEN a.ATTENDANCE_ID IS NOT NULL AND a.CHECK_OUT_TIME IS NULL AND a.ATTENDANCE_STATUS != 'LEAVE' THEN 'WORKING' ELSE 'OFFLINE' END AS WORK_STATUS FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER member
JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = member.EMPLOYEE_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = e.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN `POSITION` p ON p.POSITION_ID = e.POSITION_ID LEFT JOIN ATTENDANCE a ON a.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID AND a.WORK_DATE = CURDATE()
WHERE member.ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY member.MEMBER_ROW_ID ASC
SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_NO FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER member JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON e.EMPLOYEE_ID = member.EMPLOYEE_ID WHERE member.ROOM_ID = #{roomId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_ROOM_MEMBER member JOIN CHAT_MESSAGE cm ON cm.ROOM_ID = member.ROOM_ID WHERE member.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId} AND (cm.SENDER_ID IS NULL OR cm.SENDER_ID != #{employeeId}) AND cm.MESSAGE_ID > COALESCE(member.LAST_READ_MESSAGE_ID, 0)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGE ( ROOM_ID, SENDER_ID, MESSAGE_TYPE, CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{senderId}, #{messageType}, #{content} )
INSERT INTO CHAT_ATTACHMENT ( MESSAGE_ID, FILE_NAME, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize} )
mapper.select: SELECT ca.ATTACH_ID, ca.MESSAGE_ID, cm.ROOM_ID, ca.FILE_NAME, ca.FILE_PATH, ca.FILE_SIZE FROM CHAT_ATTACHMENT ca JOIN CHAT_MESSAGE cm ON cm.MESSAGE_ID = ca.MESSAGE_ID WHERE ca.ATTACH_ID = #{attachId}
